question.label: Energy read
question.name: How's your energy been lately — separately from how work is going?
question.description: Separates energy from output; avoids leading with 'is something wrong'.

answer: I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.

assessment.note: Pivot/off-topic from an energy question into a request for clearer criteria; no wellbeing signal scored, but strong clarity need is evident and worth taking up next.

new_queue.label: Clearer criteria
new_queue.name: When you say 'clearer criteria,' what specifically feels missing?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
